title: Second Iran-Bound Corn Ship Crossed Hormuz Before Peace Deal
title_cn: 第二艘开往伊朗的玉米船在和平协议前穿越霍尔木兹海峡
summary: A second ship laden with corn bound for Iran transited the Strait of Hormuz just hours before the US-Iran interim deal to end the war and reopen the waterway was announced.

title: Stranded Oil Is Streaming Out of Hormuz as Deal Takes Effect
title_cn: 随着协议生效，搁浅的石油正从霍尔木兹流出
summary: A growing stream of stranded oil is making its way out of the Strait of Hormuz while Kuwait said it will start ramping up production, as the US-Iran interim peace deal sparks a flurry of activity that is already pushing Middle East flows toward pre-war levels.

title: Big Tech’s AI Spending Spree Is Making Stock Buybacks Disappear
title_cn: 大型科技公司的人工智能支出热潮正在使股票回购消失
summary: The artificial-intelligence race is becoming so expensive that it’s snuffing out one of the key forces that has helped keep Big Tech stocks soaring for years: steady share buybacks.

title: Dollar Rally Builds as Hawkish Fed Meeting Stokes Rate-Hike Bets
title_cn: 美联储鹰派会议引发加息押注，美元上涨
summary: The dollar extended its rally for a second day, pushing it back toward the late-March peak, as traders piled into bets that the Federal Reserve will start raising interest rates as soon as late next month.

title: Stocks Join Bonds Higher as US-Iran Deal Sinks Oil: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着美伊协议导致石油价格下跌，股市和债券一起走高：市场结束
summary: Wall Street staged a comeback that saw stocks climbing as oil fell after a peace deal between the US and Iran spurred optimism that a revival of the Strait of Hormuz will ease inflation risks.

title: Fed Proposes Payment Stablecoin Issuer Identification Program
title_cn: 美联储提议支付稳定币发行人识别计划
summary: The Federal Reserve proposed requiring payment stablecoin issuers to maintain an effective customer identification program designed to curb illicit activities, the latest step from US regulators embracing digital assets.

title: Argentina MSCI Review Holds Key to Foreign Investment Surge
title_cn: 阿根廷 MSCI 审查是外国投资激增的关键
summary: MSCI Inc. will decide next week whether to set Argentina on the road back to membership in global stock indexes, a move that could trigger a rush of funds into the illiquid local market.

title: Intel Shares Soar After Trump Says It Struck Apple Chip Deal
title_cn: 特朗普表示与苹果达成芯片交易后英特尔股价飙升
summary: Intel Corp.’s stock surged Thursday after US President Donald Trump said the chipmaker will work alongside Apple Inc. to design and produce semiconductors domestically.

title: US Gasoline Prices Fall Below $4 as Iran Pressure Eases
title_cn: 随着伊朗压力缓解，美国汽油价格跌破 4 美元
summary: US gasoline prices dipped below $4 a gallon for the first time since March, providing welcome relief to consumers after a historic global supply disruption sent fuel costs soaring for months.

title: The Crypto-Treasury Dream Unravels After a 90% Stock Plunge
title_cn: 股价暴跌 90% 后加密货币金库梦想破灭
summary: The business model of launching a public company to buy crypto is falling apart. As a result, those in the queue to do so through blank-check companies are facing pressure from investors against a market backdrop that is fiercely unfriendly.

title: The Squeeze on Liquidity Is Just Getting Started
title_cn: 流动性紧缩才刚刚开始
summary: The stock market’s supports are falling away as liquidity tightens and rates become increasingly restrictive.

title: Goldman Sees More Two-Year Volatility Under Warsh Fed
title_cn: 高盛认为沃什美联储领导下两年期波动性更大
summary: Kay Haigh at Goldman Sachs Asset Management says two-year Treasury yields may become more volatile as Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh charts a new course for central bank communications. He speaks with Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Saudi Oil Supertankers Head for Gulf of Oman After US-Iran Deal
title_cn: 美伊协议后沙特超级油轮驶向阿曼湾
summary: At least four Saudi oil supertankers that had been idling in the Indian Ocean for weeks set sail toward the Gulf of Oman, the latest indication that producers are starting to gear up for a resumption of flows through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: SpaceX Demand Is 'Off the Charts,' Says Schwab CEO
title_cn: 施瓦布首席执行官表示，SpaceX 的需求“超出预期”
summary: Charles Schwab had one of the five busiest trading days ever when SpaceX made its stock-market debut last week. “If you think about all the market events we’ve had over those 50 years, for the IPO to crack the top five is pretty unbelievable,” Schwab Chief Executive Officer Rick Wurster said Thursday on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic Ban Forces Investor Rethink of Political Risk
title_cn: 人为禁令迫使投资者重新思考政治风险
summary: Investors in the ever-hotter AI stock rally must suddenly consider a risk with the potential to be even more damaging than high valuations and big spending: Politics getting in the way.

title: Short Seller Left Loses Mistrial Request Over Court Error
title_cn: 卖空者因法院错误而败诉无效审判请求
summary: Famed short seller Andrew Left, convicted on 13 counts of securities fraud earlier this month, lost his request for a mistrial over an unusual courtroom error that marred the end of his three-week trial.

title: Partners-Backed Eolo in Talks With Apollo Over Private Debt
title_cn: 合作伙伴支持的 Eolo 与 Apollo 就私人债务进行谈判
summary: Italian internet provider Eolo SpA is in advanced talks with Apollo Global Management over a roughly €500 million ($574 million) private debt package to refinance its liabilities, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Men Jailed in UK for China Spying Targeting Pro-Democracy Groups
title_cn: 英国因针对民主团体从事中国间谍活动而被监禁的男子
summary: Two men were jailed for as long as 10 years after being found guilty of spying for China that targeted UK based pro-democracy campaigners.

title: Prestige Hospitality Is Said to Explore Stake Sale Instead of IPO
title_cn: 据称，Prestige Hospitality 将探索出售股份而非 IPO
summary: Prestige Estates Projects Ltd. is considering putting an initial public offering of its hospitality unit on hold and is instead exploring a minority stake sale to private equity investors, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Trafigura Targets Gupta Dubai Assets In Bid to Recoup Lost Nickel Millions
title_cn: 托克瞄准 Gupta 迪拜资产以弥补数百万镍币损失
summary: Trafigura Group asked a Dubai court to tighten financial restrictions on Prateek Gupta’s wife, as it looks to recoup more than $700 million in damages owed by him for sales of fake nickel.

title: BOE's Bailey Says Holding Rates Is a 'Sensible Decision'
title_cn: 英国央行贝利表示维持利率不变是一个“明智的决定”
summary: Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey tells broadcasters energy prices remain above pre-war levels and that the the central bank needs to assess "how much damage has been done to the infrastructure for supplying energy" in the Middle East. "I think holding is the right position to be in at the moment." Bailey speaks in an interview following the BOE's decision to keep interest rates at 3.75% in a 7-2 vote.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Saudi, Qatar Add District Cooling Assets to Gulf Deals Pipeline
title_cn: 沙特和卡塔尔将区域供冷资产纳入海湾交易管道
summary: Two district cooling transactions linked to sovereign wealth funds in Saudi Arabia and Qatar are advancing, signaling continued investor appetite for Middle Eastern infrastructure assets despite geopolitical tensions.

title: Warsh Is a Hawk in Dove's Clothing, Yardeni Says
title_cn: 亚德尼称，沃什是披着鸽子外衣的鹰
summary: Ed Yardeni of Yardeni Reseach says Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh "pretty much" committed to bringing inflation down to 2%. Yardeni talks about what Warsh will do now on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hormuz Is Open But Shipowners Still Have Questions About Safety
title_cn: 霍尔木兹开放，但船东仍对安全存在疑问
summary: Oil flows through the waterway are surging, but some doubts remain.

title: India Monsoon Starts Almost 40% Short as El Niño Curbs Rains
title_cn: 由于厄尔尼诺现象抑制降雨，印度季风开始时间缩短了近 40%
summary: India’s monsoon has had an unusually weak start and the lackluster rainfall is likely to persist, threatening crops and industrial activity as the El Niño weather phenomenon takes hold.

title: US Signs Deal With Iran, But Some Trump Allies Not Happy
title_cn: 美国与伊朗签署协议，但特朗普的一些盟友并不高兴
summary: President Donald Trump signed an interim deal to end the war with Iran and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, but some Republicans say the US is giving up too much. Laura Davison reports on how the deal came together and what comes next.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Indonesia Taps Insider to Revive World’s Worst Stock Market
title_cn: 印度尼西亚利用内幕人士重振世界上最糟糕的股市
summary: Indonesia named capital markets veteran Jeffrey Hendrik as chief executive of its stock exchange, the latest effort to bolster investor confidence in the world’s worst-performing equity market.

title: Russian Gasoline Prices Jump as Ukraine Strikes Refineries
title_cn: 乌克兰袭击炼油厂导致俄罗斯汽油价格上涨
summary: Russian gasoline prices advanced further, with Ukrainian attacks on refineries forcing some filling stations to limit sales just as the summer vacation season gets underway.

title: Chemicals Maker Ashland Pushed to Sell by Activist Cruiser
title_cn: 化学品制造商阿什兰被激进巡洋舰推动出售
summary: Cruiser Capital Advisors is pushing Ashland Inc. to sell itself, increasing the pressure on the specialty chemicals company after another activist investor called for a sale earlier this month.

title: Oil Falls as Iran Peace Deal Gets Tankers Moving Through Hormuz
title_cn: 伊朗和平协议使油轮通过霍尔木兹海峡，油价下跌
summary: Oil futures and retail gasoline prices fell as the US and Iran agreed to end their months-long conflict and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, spurring a flurry of ships to cross the critical chokepoint.

title: Why AI’s All-You-Can-Eat Buffet Is Coming to an End
title_cn: 为什么人工智能的自助餐即将结束
summary: Silicon Valley spent much of the past few years feverishly pushing consumers and businesses to inject artificial intelligence into every corner of their lives. Now AI developers want their customers to pay more for the technology they actually use.

title: Waymo Recalls Robotaxis Over Driving Through Freeway Work Zones
title_cn: Waymo 召回超过高速公路工作区的机器人出租车
summary: Waymo is recalling thousands of its robotaxis to fix a software issue that could cause the autonomous vehicles to enter and drive at speed through freeway construction zones.

title: Stocks Rise at the Open With Intel Leading Semiconductor Rally
title_cn: 英特尔引领半导体涨势，股市开盘上涨
summary: US stocks rose on Thursday as chips shares extended Wednesday’s rally. Intel Corp. surged after President Donald Trump said the chipmaker struck a deal with Apple Inc. to design and produce semiconductors domestically.

title: Accenture Forecast Sends Stock Tumbling a Record 20%
title_cn: 埃森哲预测股价暴跌创纪录 20%
summary: Accenture Plc said it’s expecting to reel in less revenue in the coming months, as artificial intelligence upends the consulting services industry and clients paused business due to the conflict in the Middle East.

title: Anthropic Lays Out Vision for How to Bolster AI Models’ Safety
title_cn: Anthropic 提出了如何增强人工智能模型安全性的愿景
summary: Anthropic PBC co-founder Jack Clark said the company is in daily discussions with the Trump administration to resolve security concerns surrounding the startup’s top two artificial intelligence models and outlined his vision for ensuring the safety of the emerging technology.

title: AI Power Boom Catapults NextEra to Top of Hybrid Debt Market
title_cn: 人工智能的蓬勃发展使 NextEra 跃居混合债务市场之首
summary: As utilities splash out on spending to power America’s AI boom, NextEra Energy Inc. has just emerged as the largest issuer of hybrid bonds worldwide.

title: SpaceX Shares Fall for Second Straight Day After 49% Jump
title_cn: SpaceX 股价大涨 49% 后连续第二天下跌
summary: SpaceX shares slipped for a second straight day as it wraps up its first week as a public company following a record initial public offering.

title: ‘Grand Theft Auto VI’ Pre-Orders to Open June 25; Take-Two Jumps
title_cn: 《侠盗猎车手 VI》将于 6 月 25 日开放预购；两次跳跃
summary: Take-Two Interactive Software Inc. will open pre-orders for Grand Theft Auto VI on June 25, kicking off the launch of one of the most anticipated video games of all time.

title: Tariffs Greater Impact Than War: Trumpf
title_cn: 特朗普：关税的影响比战争更大
summary: The Iran war has not had a "severe" impact on the machine tool industry says Stephan Mayer, CEO for Machine Tools at German manufacturing technology firm Trumpf. Instead, the bigger headwind to the industry has been tariffs, according to Mayer. He spoke to "The Pulse with Francine Lacqua" on Bloomberg TV. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Microsoft, Amazon Cloud Services Face Tough EU Antitrust Law
title_cn: 微软、亚马逊云服务面临严厉的欧盟反垄断法
summary: Microsoft Corp.’s Azure and Amazon Web Services are on a collision course with the European Union’s tough digital competition rulebook, after an initial probe into their power over the cloud.

title: Software Buyout King Orlando Bravo Attempts an AI-Era Reboot
title_cn: 软件收购之王 Orlando Bravo 尝试重启人工智能时代
summary: The billionaire behind Thoma Bravo is seeking to reassure investors that the private equity firm is ready to embrace AI — and that its losing bet on Medallia is a one-off.

title: US Premarket Movers for June 18, 2026
title_cn: 2026 年 6 月 18 日美国盘前走势
summary: US stocks are eyeing a rebound after President Donald Trump signed an interim peace deal with Iran. S&P 500 Index futures are up 0.5% at 7:45 a.m. in New York.

title: Lawyer Takes Fight to Keep Kids Off Social Media From Courthouse to Political Arena
title_cn: 从法院到政治舞台，律师努力阻止孩子们远离社交媒体
summary: Matthew Bergman pitched UK officials to protect kids from social media harms

title: Europe Scales Down AI Ambitions With Smaller Data Center Tender
title_cn: 欧洲通过缩小数据中心招标规模来缩小人工智能野心
summary: The European Union downsized plans for data centers to support artificial intelligence, outlining a call for tenders that includes smaller-scale facilities than originally envisioned.

title: Swiss AI Startup Prem Is Raising $100 Million Series A Round
title_cn: 瑞士人工智能初创公司 Prem 筹集 1 亿美元 A 轮融资
summary: Prem AI, a Swiss startup that helps companies including hedge funds and law firms run artificial intelligence models on their own private infrastructure, is raising $100 million in a Series A funding round.

title: Europe Wants AI in Manufacturing Before Its Workforce Retires
title_cn: 欧洲希望在劳动力退休之前将人工智能引入制造业
summary: As factory workers retire, Europe’s industries turn to AI to fill the coming labor gap.

title: AI for Industry Is Europe’s Hope to Salvage Manufacturing Edge
title_cn: 工业人工智能是欧洲挽救制造业优势的希望
summary: Pressure to become more efficient has Europe racing to bring artificial intelligence to the shop floor.

title: AI Company Dream Triples Value to $3 Billion in Funding Round
title_cn: AI 公司 Dream 在本轮融资中估值增加三倍至 30 亿美元
summary: Dream, an Israeli artificial intelligence company that provides AI and cybersecurity services to governments and critical infrastructure operators, has raised $260 million at a $3 billion valuation.

title: China Stock Gauge Nears Bear Market on Weak Growth, Tech Slide
title_cn: 中国股市因增长疲弱而接近熊市，技术下滑
summary: A major Chinese stock gauge is on the cusp of a bear market, underscoring deepening concerns about the country’s growth outlook and the underperformance of its heavily weighted Internet and consumer firms.

title: Jeremy Grantham on How to Tell if a Bubble's About to Burst | Odd Lots
title_cn: 杰里米·格兰瑟姆 (Jeremy Grantham) 谈如何判断泡沫是否即将破裂 |零股
summary: Jeremy Grantham, co-founder and long-term strategist of GMO, has a long history of calling bubbles. As he recounts in his new memoir, The Making of a Permabear: The Perils of Long-Term Investing in a Short-Term World, that includes spotting the dot-com bubble of the early 2000s, which some people see as analogous to the current excitement over AI. And when it comes to today's market, there are a lot of signs of frothiness you could point to. In this episode, we speak to Grantham about how he sees markets right now, including a watershed change for Big Tech stocks, the signs he watches out for to spot when a bubble might burst, and what really keeps him up at night. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Plurimi CIO Sees Value in AI Supply Chain
title_cn: Plurimi 首席信息官看到人工智能供应链的价值
summary: Plurimi Wealth Chief Investment Officer Patrick Armstrong says he sees value in the artificial intelligence supply chain, stocks such as Micron, Samsung and Nvidia. "We're underweight the Magnificent Seven — the hyperscalers — those are the companies that are spending a trillion dollars over the next 12 months on AI datacenters," Armstrong tells Bloomberg Television. "And we own the companies they're giving the money to." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China AI Lab’s 170% Stock Surge Cements Winner-Loser Pair Trade
title_cn: 中国人工智能实验室股价暴涨170% 巩固赢家与输家配对交易
summary: A pair trade is emerging in China’s artificial intelligence sector, with investors piling into the perceived winner and betting against its rival seen as losing ground in the race to build commercially viable AI models.

title: Blackstone’s AirTrunk Seeks $3 Billion Loan for Sydney Project
title_cn: Blackstone 的 AirTrunk 为悉尼项目寻求 30 亿美元贷款
summary: AirTrunk Pty., a data center operator backed by Blackstone Inc., is in talks with banks for a A$4.3 billion ($3 billion) loan to back a new project in Australia, people familiar with the matter said, as it continues its debt-fueled expansion across Asia Pacific.

title: Kingboard’s 570% Rally Is Being Powered by Mainland Investors
title_cn: 建滔570%涨势由内地投资者推动
summary: Chinese investors have fueled a surge in shares of newfound AI darling Kingboard Laminates Holdings Ltd., more than doubling their stake in the company to 13% this year, according to the latest stock exchange data.

title: Lenovo Raises $2 Billion From Seven-Year Convertible Bonds
title_cn: 联想通过七年期可转换债券筹集 20 亿美元
summary: Lenovo Group Ltd. fetched $2 billion from the sale of seven-year convertible bonds, two years after it raised a similar amount from Saudi Arabia’s sovereign wealth fund.

title: Circles Sold Phone Spy Tools to Repressive States, Report Says
title_cn: 报告称，Circles 向专制国家出售电话间谍工具
summary: A Bulgaria-based company sold controversial surveillance technology to governments in countries with records of repression, enabling authorities to track mobile phones and eavesdrop on private communications, according to documents obtained by Human Rights Watch.

title: Korea Rejects Baemin, Coupang Settlement Bids in Antitrust Probe
title_cn: 韩国拒绝 Baemin、Coupang 反垄断调查和解请求
summary: South Korea’s antitrust watchdog has rejected settlement proposals from the country’s two largest food delivery platforms, Baedal Minjok and Coupang Eats, leaving both firms exposed to potentially significant fines over alleged unfair business practices.

title: Biggest Baltic Rail Project Needs EU’s Help, Latvia Premier Says
title_cn: 拉脱维亚总理表示最大的波罗的海铁路项目需要欧盟的帮助
summary: Latvia’s prime minister said he intends to approach the European Union’s executive arm with a new plan for the Rail Baltica train link, as the Baltic region’s biggest infrastructure project is unlikely to be completed on time.

title: Zimbabwe Lawmakers Back Two-Year Extension to President’s Tenure
title_cn: 津巴布韦立法者支持将总统任期延长两年
summary: Zimbabwean lawmakers approved a controversial amendment to the constitution that will lay the ground for President Emmerson Mnangagwa to extend his rule by two years.

title: US Announces Military Review as European Leaders Await Cuts
title_cn: 美国宣布军事审查，欧洲领导人等待削减
summary: Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth said the US will kick off a six-month review of its military presence in Europe as leaders in the region brace for a plan for deep cuts to American support for the continent.

title: Abu Dhabi’s $1 Trillion Man Emerges as Iran Troubleshooter
title_cn: 阿布扎比身价1万亿美元的人成为伊朗问题解决者
summary: Sheikh Tahnoon bin Zayed Al Nahyan is best known as the defacto business chief of Abu Dhabi’s wealthy ruling family and the man at the helm of a $1.5 trillion empire. Behind the scenes, he has taken on another role: Diplomatic emissary charged with helping rebuild the United Arab Emirates’ relationship with Iran.

title: Venezuela Hires Law Firm to Help Negotiate Oil Production Deals
title_cn: 委内瑞拉聘请律师事务所帮助谈判石油生产协议
summary: Venezuela’s short-staffed national oil company has hired international law firm Greenberg Traurig to help expedite contract negotiations with a flurry of companies ahead of a key regulatory deadline in August.

title: China Rejects Japan Defense Chief Criticism of Military Spending
title_cn: 中国拒绝日本防卫长官对军费开支的批评
summary: China rejected criticism from Japanese Defense Minister Shinjiro Koizumi about the accuracy of its military spending, accusing Japan of using such arguments to justify the expansion of its own armed forces.

title: Cuba Makes Market-Friendly Changes in the Face of Trump Pressure
title_cn: 古巴面对特朗普压力做出有利于市场的改变
summary: Cuba’s leadership signed off on a sweeping list of 176 market-liberalization measures covering 23 core areas, as the Caribbean nation tries to rescue a moribund economy that’s being squeezed by US sanctions.

title: JPMorgan’s Vince La Padula to Join IRS After 23 Years at Bank
title_cn: 摩根大通 (JPMorgan) 的文斯·拉帕杜拉 (Vince La Padula) 在银行工作 23 年后加入国税局 (IRS)
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s Vince La Padula, who led the firm’s workplace solutions business, will leave the bank after more than two decades to take a senior role at the Internal Revenue Service.

title: Trump’s Iran Deal Sets Up Legacy-Defining Moment
title_cn: 特朗普的伊朗协议树立了历史性的决定性时刻
summary: Some Republicans are already lacing into the agreement

title: Trump Inks Iran Deal, Shifting Focus to Hormuz, 60-Day Talks
title_cn: 特朗普签署伊朗协议，焦点转向霍尔木兹，为期 60 天的会谈
summary: US President Donald Trump formally agreed an interim peace deal with Iran, shifting focus to the planned reopening of the Strait of Hormuz and a complex 60-day negotiating period over Tehran’s nuclear program.

title: UK Cabinet Pushes Starmer to Raise Defense Spending Amid Row
title_cn: 英国内阁敦促斯塔默在争议中增加国防开支
summary: Some UK cabinet ministers are pushing Prime Minister Keir Starmer and his chancellor of the Exchequer, Rachel Reeves, to increase defense funding further, following John Healey’s resignation over the spending row.

title: Brazil Police Target Lula Ally in Banco Master Probe
title_cn: 巴西警方在银行主调查中瞄准卢拉盟友
summary: Brazil’s federal police targeted Senator Jaques Wagner, the government leader in the upper house, as part of an investigation into alleged irregularities linked to Banco Master, according to a person with knowledge of the matter.

title: Turkey to Reopen Orthodox Seminary in Face of Trump, EU Pressure
title_cn: 面对特朗普和欧盟的压力，土耳其将重新开放东正教神学院
summary: Turkey plans to reopen the long-shuttered Halki seminary as a university, reviving an institution central to Orthodox Christianity and addressing a longstanding demand from the US and the European Union.

title: Lithuania Agrees to Chinese Diplomatic Office After Taiwan Row
title_cn: 立陶宛在台湾争端后同意中国外交办公室
summary: Lithuania dropped its opposition to China’s plans to establish a lower-level representation in the Baltic nation, signaling a willingness to restore ties after a rupture over Taiwan.

title: Israel Foreign Minister Severs Ties With EU’s Top Diplomat
title_cn: 以色列外长与欧盟高级外交官断绝关系
summary: Israel’s foreign minister said he was cutting off all contact with the European Union’s top diplomat, Kaja Kallas, citing her “blatant unfairness” and underscoring the Jewish state’s growing isolation from many of its closest allies.

title: First Saudi Supertankers Begin Hormuz Crossing
title_cn: 第一批沙特超级油轮开始穿越霍尔木兹海峡
summary: Some oil and gas vessels have begun to cross the Strait of Hormuz, including ships owned by Saudi Arabia’s state tanker giant. The movement of Saudi ships through the waterway marks the first large volumes of Saudi oil to cross the strait since the Iran war began. Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump’s Iran Deal Needs a Nuclear Mousetrap
title_cn: 特朗普的伊朗协议需要一个核捕鼠器
summary: Interim pact opens the door for 60 days of talks that will show who wins the debate on Iran.

title: How an Oil Outsider Became Shale’s Staunchest Defender
title_cn: 石油局外人如何成为页岩最坚定的捍卫者
summary: Known for his public candor, Diamondback Energy boss Kaes Van’t Hof is advocating for shale as the Iran war stokes market volatility.

title: Record Ukrainian Drone Attack on Moscow Targets Refinery
title_cn: 乌克兰无人机对莫斯科炼油厂发起创纪录袭击
summary: Russia’s capital faced a record air bombardment overnight, with drones reaching the Moscow Oil Refinery, disrupting airport operations and forcing the closure of several major roads in and around the city.

title: NATO Plans to Modernize Nuclear Assets and Improve Planning
title_cn: 北约计划实现核资产现代化并改进规划
summary: NATO will modernize its nuclear capabilities and improve planning, the alliance’s defense ministers said on Thursday in a rare statement on an area of deterrence that’s gaining more focus as the US scales down conventional military presence in Europe.

title: Trump Ally Vowing Death to Cartels Closes In on Colombia Presidency
title_cn: 特朗普盟友誓言消灭卡特尔 哥伦比亚总统任期临近
summary: In a victory speech delivered from behind a bulletproof screen, on a barge in a Caribbean river estuary, Abelardo de la Espriella vowed to hunt down Colombia’s worst criminals.

title: Trump Poised to Roll Out New Tariffs as He Refunds the Old Ones
title_cn: 特朗普准备在退还旧关税的同时推出新关税
summary: Tariff revenue is now flowing out of the US Treasury’s coffers faster than it’s coming in, with nearly $22 billion in unlawfully collected duties reimbursed to importers in May.

title: NATO Deploys SAMP/T Missile System to Turkey in Boost to Defense
title_cn: 北约在土耳其部署 SAMP/T 导弹系统以加强防御
summary: NATO deployed an Italian SAMP/T missile-defense system in the central Anatolian city of Konya to reinforce the alliance’s air defense, Turkey’s Defense Ministry said on Thursday.

title: India Treads Cautiously as Trump Seeks Fresh Start With Modi
title_cn: 特朗普寻求与莫迪重新开始，印度谨慎行事
summary: US President Donald Trump showered Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi with praise in their first in-person meeting in more than a year.

title: Inside the Chaotic Iran Talks That Let Trump Claim Victory
title_cn: 混乱的伊朗谈判内部让特朗普宣称胜利
summary: The result of weeks of intense diplomacy, the interim agreement between the US and Iran puts off many of the thorniest issues.

title: Trump Signs US-Iran Deal, Warsh Fuels Fed Rate Hike Bets | Daybreak Europe 6/18/2026
title_cn: 特朗普签署美伊协议，沃什助长美联储加息押注黎明欧洲 6/18/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

President Donald Trump signed an interim deal to end the war with Iran and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, speeding up the timeline for the agreement to go into effect despite blowback from Republicans who said it amounted to a victory for Tehran.

Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh vowed to restore price stability following his first policy meeting since taking the helm of the US central bank, after officials left interest rates unchanged and signaled growing support for rate hikes this year.

Today's guests: Jackie Bowie, Head of EMEA, Chatham Financial; Chloé Poisbeau, COO, Alice & Bob. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Switzerland Loses Top Competitiveness Ranking to Singapore
title_cn: 瑞士的竞争力排名被新加坡夺走
summary: Switzerland lost its position as the world’s most competitive economy to Singapore, slipping to third place in the ranking as high US trade tariffs and a strong Swiss franc hurt investment flows.

title: Alice & Bob's Poisbeau on Quantum Computing
title_cn: 爱丽丝和鲍勃关于量子计算的泊博
summary: Alice & Bob COO Chloé Poisbeau discusses their agreement with France for the the world’s first acquisition of a quantum computer based on cat-qubit technology. She spoke with Bloomberg's Tom Mackenzie from the VivaTech 2026 conference in Paris, during Bloomberg Daybreak Europe. (Source: Bloomberg)
